##NAMES=Galaxite
##RRUFFID=R140320
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Mn^2+^Al_2_O_4_
##LOCALITY=Bald Knob deposit, Bald Knob, Sparta, Alleghany County, North Carolina, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Lyle Gordon
##DESCRIPTION=Dark red-brown granular crystals, associated with alleghanyite, psilomelane, and jacobsite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140320
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Mn_0.94_Mg_0.06_Co_0.02_)(Al_1.61_Fe^3+^_0.38_)O_4_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.2716 b: 8.2716 c: 8.2716 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 565.94 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
